plugins.name: codex-util
plugins.description: Use Codex AI features inside Claude Code via the ChatGPT subscription path (no Platform API key, no Node CLI fork per call)

plugins.name: nanobanana-mcp
plugins.description: Google Gemini image generation MCP server (Nano Banana) — flash and pro modes

plugins.name: autobot
plugins.description: App idea to TestFlight in one command. Enterprise-grade iOS 26+ app builder with parallel agent orchestration and self-improving build process.

plugins.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
plugins.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.description: Professional UI/UX design intelligence for AI coding assistants. Includes searchable databases of styles, colors, typography, charts, and UX guidelines for React, Next.js, Astro, Vue, Nuxt.js, Nuxt UI, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and Jetpack Compose.

plugins.name: axiom
plugins.description: Battle-tested Claude Code agents, skills, and references for modern xOS (iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, tvOS) development

plugins.name: app-store-screenshots
plugins.description: End-to-end App Store and Google Play screenshot generator — scaffolds a Next.js project that renders advertisement-style screenshots for iPhone, iPad, Android phone/tablet, and Feature Graphic, then exports PNGs at all required Apple and Google resolutions.
